query:
SELECT ec.seq, ec.podcast_id, ec.episode_id, ec.op
            FROM episode_change ec
            JOIN user_subscription us
              ON us.podcast_id = ec.podcast_id
            JOIN users u
              ON u.id = us.user_id
            WHERE u.username = $1
              AND ec.seq > $2
            ORDER BY ec.seq ASC
            LIMIT $3
